info.title: rabbitdump
info.description: Tool to import and export messages from RabbitMQ queues

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: CommandLineApplication.Parse, OK: CommandLineApplication.Execute, OK: CommandLineApplication.ExecuteAsync, OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(), OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(IConsole), OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(IConsole, String), OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(IHelpTextGenerator, IConsole, String))

options.name: --input-type
options.description: Overrides auto detection of input type [default: Unset]

options.name: --output-type
options.description: Overrides auto detection of output type [default: Unset]

options.name: --exchange
options.description: Override the output exchange, use a dash (-) to signify the default exchange

options.name: --continuous
options.description: Continue subscribing to events from the Input

options.name: --one-shot
options.description: Only run the data move once - we'll make best efforts to stop in a timely manner for AMQP inputs

options.name: --count
options.description: Limit the transfer to a number of items

arguments.name: Arguments
arguments.description: When the input is an AMQP uri, this is the queues to dump
